scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && vite build
scripts.test:unit: node --no-warnings --loader ./scripts/ts-extension-loader.mjs src/lib/skillCapabilityClassifier.test.ts && node --no-warnings --loader ./scripts/ts-extension-loader.mjs src/lib/skillIdentityModel.test.ts && node --no-warnings --loader ./scripts/ts-extension-loader.mjs src/lib/skillDisplayEnrichment.test.ts
